targets.query:
wp = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "cic_total_power_input")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "wp"})

p1 = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "p1_meter_3c39e72bdf42_active_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "p1"})

join(tables: {wp: wp, p1: p1}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r.wp > r.p1 then r.wp - r.p1 else r.wp,
      _field: "Eigen productie (W)"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

wp = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "cic_total_power_input")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "wp"})

p1 = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "p1_meter_3c39e72bdf42_active_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "p1"})

join(tables: {wp: wp, p1: p1}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r.p1 > 0.0 then if r.wp < r.p1 then r.wp else r.p1 else 0.0,
      _field: "Import van net (W)"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "cic_total_power_input")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WP Totaal (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "envoy_122149071873_current_power_production")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Solar (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "marstek_venus_modbus_battery_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value < 0.0 then r._value * -1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Marstek ontladen (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sessy_dn4t_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.0 then r._value else 0.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Sessy DN4T ontladen (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sessy_d9af_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.0 then r._value else 0.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Sessy D9AF ontladen (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sessy_dx3j_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.0 then r._value else 0.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Sessy DX3J ontladen (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "boiler_heat_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Ketel (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "cic_total_power_input")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WP input (W)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "p1_meter_3c39e72bdf42_total_gas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Gas verbruik (m³)")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "boiler_cic_on_off_mode")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Ketel aan/uit")
  |> drop(columns: ["domain", "entity_id"])
